strengths: 15+ years full-stack experience across TypeScript/Node.js, React, and multiple languages
Current role at re:cinq involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, directly matching AI agent requirement
Strong testing/craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, workshops on testing and Selenium)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in resume
Limited explicit cloud platform breadth shown (AWS CDK noted, but GCP/Azure and Kubernetes depth unclear beyond GISCollective)
Kotlin experience not evidenced; Java exposure appears dated (robotic arms, 2016-2018)
response.justification: Candidate brings deep, long-tenured full-stack experience with the core TypeScript/Node.js/React stack, a strong engineering-craftsmanship orientation (TDD, CI/CD, testing workshops), and directly relevant recent work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling. Gaps exist around explicit Nest.js usage and current Kotlin/Java proficiency, and cloud/Kubernetes depth is only partially evidenced, but the overall profile aligns well with the role's primary stack and responsibilities.
